title: P4: Missing documentation for one-shot RX contract and rxOneShot usage
description: The RX path now uses rxOneShot to implement one-shot (PollRx/SetRx with finite timeout) vs continuous. Add detailed comment explaining the contract: SetRx with timeout!=0xFFFFFF sets rxOneShot=true and rxMode=true; on RX_PACKET if rxOneShot then rxMode=false (exits RX after first packet); continuous keeps rxMode=true for multiple packets. All accesses under stateLock to prevent races with SPI thread, reader, CS GPIO FinishTransmission, SetTx/SetStandby. Fix all P4 as real work per codereview. Tagged codereview.
close_reason: Added comprehensive documentation of one-shot RX contract
